Fundings

Grants and Funding

USDA National Institute of Food and Agriculture (NIFA)

Partnership: Next Generation Trade Intelligence for U.S. Beef, Pork, and Poultry Producers

  • Role: Co–Principal Investigator (Co–PI)
  • Amount: $800,000 (NDSU Subaward: $275,000)
  • Period: 09/01/2026 – 08/31/2029
  • Project Director: Modhurima Amin, Texas Tech University
  • Status: Submitted October 2025
